positive: Retro vaporwave illustration of a chrome dolphin leaping over a grid-patterned sunset horizon. The color palette is dominated by neon magenta, cyan, and electric purple. Synthwave aesthetic, 80s digital art, geometric shapes, grainy texture, highly stylized.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural light, messy, realism
